mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, ((1.5 + LN(1 + (p.like_count * 1.0 + p.comment_count * 2.0 + p.repost_count * 2.8))) / POW(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, p.created_at, NOW()) + 2, 1.8)) AS all_score FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY all_score DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM post p INNER JOIN follow f ON p.user_id = f.following_id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, (LN(1 + (p.like_count * 1.2 + p.comment_count * 2.4 + p.repost_count * 3.0)) / POW(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, p.created_at, NOW()) + 2, 1.2)) AS hot_score FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY hot_score DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, (LN(1 + (p.like_count * 1.2 + p.comment_count * 2.4 + p.repost_count * 3.0)) / POW(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, p.created_at, NOW()) + 2, 1.2)) AS hot_score FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY hot_score DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, content, media_url, media_type, repost_id, original_content, like_count, comment_count, repost_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{mediaUrl}, #{mediaType}, #{repostId}, #{originalContent}, 0, 0, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET repost_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
